arts.ttl: Matheus Cunha update given as Man Utd, Liverpool & Newcastle join Arsenal in race for Wolves man
arts.sum: Matheus Cunha will not try to ‘force’ his way out of Wolves this January, according to reports. The Brazilian forward has been in stunning form this season, with his goal against Manchester United on Boxing Day taking him to 10 goals and four assists in 18 Premier League appearances — only four players boast a […] The post Matheus Cunha update given as Man Utd, Liverpool & Newcastle join Arsenal in race for Wolves man appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: LIVE: Arsenal host Ipswich as Gabriel Jesus leads line
arts.sum: All the action from the Emirates as Arsenal look to close the gap on Liverpool. ESPN has updates

arts.ttl: David Raya names exact Arsenal turning point after 'worst game of my career'
arts.sum: Arsenal goalkeeper David Raya has explained that a clash with Luton Town last season was the turning point for his career in North London. "That was my mentality, just to keep working." There are few doubters of Raya at Arsenal now having secured the No.1 spot at the Emirates Stadium and winning the Golden Glove award last season.

arts.ttl: Santi Cazorla makes Arsenal return after clear Mikel Arteta admission
arts.sum: Speaking to Sky Sports earlier this year, Cazorla said: "I have a very special affection for Arsenal. Former Arsenal midfielder Santi Cazorla will be present at Emirates Stadium for this evening's Premier League clash against Ipswich Town.

arts.ttl: Arsenal see first January decision made amid Olmo and Kolo Muani transfer chance
arts.sum: Despite Saka's early withdrawal, Arsenal still won 5-1 at Selhurst Park with Gabriel Jesus scoring a brace while Kai Havertz and Gabriel Martinelli were also on target Those names scoring consistently is not a guarantee though and thus no Saka will likely be felt over the coming weeks with Arteta eager to see how his team respond. On signing a winger in January to replace Saka, he added: " My intention right now is to get the best of what we have in the time right now." Though Arteta has suggested there is no immediate plan to bring in another face, two unique opportunities look to have emerged.

arts.ttl: Arsenal may be step closer to sealing first January transfer amid Bukayo Saka injury concern
arts.sum: The young forward has gained valuable experience this season in Brazil, making 36 appearances across all competitions, scoring twice and setting up three goals. However, if an overseas loan opportunity presents itself, the Gunners may be interested - though there is no sign they will be joining the pursuit of PSG striker Randal Kolo Muani, who will be allowed to leave in January after falling out of favour with the French giants and is set to be offered to a number of clubs.

arts.ttl: Arsenal v Ipswich: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Live updates from the 8.15 kick-off Arteta backs Martinelli to thrive in ‘bigger role’ Why not email Scott with your thoughts 22 sec: Ipswich are on the front foot immediately. Phillips wins the ball on the edge of the Arsenal box and feeds Davis down the left. Davis whistles a cross through the six-yard box. Any touch from Szmodics would have resulted in a stunning early goal, but he can’t connect. Arsenal breathe again. Ipswich get the ball rolling. A good few-evening-pints-in atmosphere at the Emirates! Continue reading...

arts.sum: The Hoops diehard is set for the Arsenal exit door and talk is in overdrive about an emotional return to his boyhood club

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Ipswich Town - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates as Bukayo Saka's replacement is named and Thomas Partey is dropped... plus updates from Brighton vs Brentford in the early kick-off
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest scores, team news and updates from the Premier League kick-offs between Arsenal vs Ipswich Town and Brighton vs Brentford.

arts.ttl: Dani Olmo sends wordless message after Arsenal handed major January transfer update
arts.sum: Dani Olmo has sent a message on social media following a major Barcelona transfer update amid links to Arsenal, Manchester United and Manchester City. Olmo's agent was spotted in Manchester earlier this week with United and City both having been linked in recent trading periods.
